indicators.name: dining table
indicators.rationale: The dining table is not suitable for computer work due to its height and lack of ergonomics.

indicators.name: chair
indicators.rationale: The chair is not designed for extended computer use, lacking ergonomic support.

indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring can be slippery and may cause discomfort when standing or walking.

indicators.name: large windows
indicators.rationale: Large windows allow natural light to enter, which can be distracting and reduce screen visibility.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height to set up a computer workstation.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). The presence of a dining table and chairs suggests a residential setting rather than a dedicated workspace. The hardwood flooring and large windows add distractions and do not support ergonomic computer use. There is no flat personal work surface at sitting height, making it difficult to set up a computer workstation.
